title: clerodendrum inaequipetiolatum
intro: Clerodendrum inaequipetiolatum is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, native to tropical Africa, commonly known as 'African Clerodendrum'. The plant has been used in traditional medicine, exhibiting medicinal properties such as antibacterial and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits associated with Clerodendrum inaequipetiolatum include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its use as an anti-diarrheal agent. Herbal preparations of the plant, typically in the form of infusions or decoctions, are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
